select gender, day, total from (select gender, day, score_points, sum(score_points) over (partition by gender order by day) as total from scores) as aggregate

SELECT aggregate.c_gender0 AS gender, aggregate.c_day0 AS day, aggregate.c_0 AS total FROM (SELECT T_scores_0.gender AS c_gender0, T_scores_0.day AS c_day0, SUM(T_scores_0.score_points) OVER ( PARTITION BY T_scores_0.gender ORDER BY T_scores_0.day ASC ) AS c_0 FROM scores AS T_scores_0) AS aggregate
select p1.gender, p1.day, sum(p2.score_points) as total from scores as p1 join scores as p2 on (p1.gender = p2.gender and p1.day >= p2.day) group by p1.gender, p1.day order by p1.gender, p1.day
SELECT p2.gender AS gender, p2.day AS day, SUM(p2.score_points) OVER ( PARTITION BY p2.gender ORDER BY p2.day ASC ) AS total FROM scores AS p2 GROUP BY p2.gender,p2.day
select s.gender, s.day, sum(s.score_points) over (partition by s.gender order by day) as total from scores as s order by s.gender, s.day
select s.gender, s.day, sum(s.score_points) over (partition by s.gender order by day) as total from scores as s
select s1.gender, s1.day, sum(s2.score_points) as total from scores as s1 join scores as s2 on (s1.gender = s2.gender and s2.day <= s1.day) group by s1.gender, s1.day order by s1.gender, s1.day
SELECT s2.gender AS gender, s2.day AS day, SUM(s2.score_points) OVER ( PARTITION BY s2.gender ORDER BY s2.day ASC ) AS total FROM scores AS s2 GROUP BY s2.day,s2.gender

select s1.gender, s1.day, sum(s2.score_points) as total from scores as s1 left outer join scores as s2 on (s1.day >= s2.day and s1.gender = s2.gender) group by s1.gender, s1.day order by s1.gender, s1.day
SELECT s2.gender AS gender, s2.day AS day, SUM(s2.score_points) OVER ( PARTITION BY s2.gender ORDER BY s2.day ASC ) AS total FROM scores AS s2 GROUP BY s2.day,s2.gender
select s1.gender, s1.day, sum(s2.score_points) as total from scores as s1 join scores as s2 on (s1.day >= s2.day and s1.gender = s2.gender) group by s1.gender, s1.day order by s1.gender, s1.day
SELECT s2.gender AS gender, s2.day AS day, SUM(s2.score_points) OVER ( PARTITION BY s2.gender ORDER BY s2.day ASC ) AS total FROM scores AS s2 GROUP BY s2.day,s2.gender

select s1.gender, s1.day, sum(s2.score_points) as total from scores as s1 left outer join scores as s2 on (s1.gender = s2.gender and s1.day >= s2.day) group by s1.gender, s1.day order by s1.gender, s1.day
SELECT s2.gender AS gender, s2.day AS day, SUM(s2.score_points) OVER ( PARTITION BY s2.gender ORDER BY s2.day ASC ) AS total FROM scores AS s2 GROUP BY s2.day,s2.gender
select t1.gender, t1.day, sum(t2.score_points) as total from scores as t1 join scores as t2 on (t1.gender = t2.gender and t1.day >= t2.day) group by t1.gender, t1.day order by t1.gender, t1.day
